notes: Source is ManualsLib (secondary) — Extron's own product page blocked automated access. The SW4 HDMI uses HDMI 1.3 (6.75 Gbps max, 165 MHz pixel clock, 1080p/60 max); hdmi-1.4 is used as the closest available grade since hdmi-1.3 is not in the schema. The front-panel Config port is labeled 'mini Type B USB' in the manual — mapped to usb-micro as the closest connector id (usb-b is full-size; the actual port is mini-B, a distinct form factor not in the schema). Power connector is a 2-pole euroblock-dc captive screw on the device; the wall adapter is an external 12 VDC supply. No RJ45/Ethernet on this original SW4 HDMI model (that was added in the later SW HD 4K PLUS series).

ports.name: HDMI In 1
ports.note: Type A female; max data rate 6.75 Gbps (HDMI 1.3 spec); hdmi-1.4 is the closest available grade

ports.name: HDMI In 2
ports.note: Type A female; max data rate 6.75 Gbps (HDMI 1.3 spec)

ports.name: HDMI In 3
ports.note: Type A female; max data rate 6.75 Gbps (HDMI 1.3 spec)

ports.name: HDMI In 4
ports.note: Type A female; max data rate 6.75 Gbps (HDMI 1.3 spec)

ports.name: HDMI Out
ports.note: Type A female; max data rate 6.75 Gbps (HDMI 1.3 spec)

ports.name: Remote
ports.note: 5-pole 3.5mm captive screw connector; RS-232 (Tx, Rx, GND) and auto-input switching (pins 4-5 short); 9600 baud, 8N1

ports.name: Config
ports.note: Mini Type B USB on front panel; used for SIS command configuration and firmware updates; manual states 'mini Type B'

ports.name: Power
ports.note: 2-pole 3.5mm captive screw connector; accepts 12 VDC, 1 A from included external power supply (100-240 VAC to 12 VDC)
